title: DerivedCodeowners
description: Output of bin/derive-codeowners.sh — suggested CODEOWNERS mappings derived from git history, ranked by commit count per top-level directory. Consumed by bin/gen-codeowners.sh --derived-owners. Top-level value is an array (the script does not wrap it in an object) so consumers must handle 0..N items.

path.description: Top-level directory the suggestion applies to, slash-wrapped (e.g. '/src/').

suggested_owner.description: CODEOWNERS-valid owner (an @handle, @org/team, or email) derived from the top author's email, or "" when none could be derived.

suggested_name.description: Top author's display name, surfaced for a manual-assignment comment when suggested_owner is empty.

commit_count.description: Number of commits the top author made under this directory.

confidence.description: Top author's share of total commits under this directory (commit_count / total commits).
